actions.condition_unmet_message: The clamps hold the Deep-Core Engine in place until the Titan Walker is no longer guarding the core.

actions.name: array rack
actions.condition_unmet_message: The array rack stores ship-scale Phase-Cutter Arrays meant for something far larger than the Astra.

title: Titan Dock
description: A circular platform hangs over the volcano primary vent. Catwalks tremble above orange depth while a Titan Walker waits in its launch cradle.

description_variants.description: Factory alarms turn the Titan Dock red. The Astra waits beyond the escape catwalk with a stolen engine, stolen arrays, and not much time.
The Titan Walker lies broken in its launch cradle. The dock still trembles over the primary vent, but the path back to the Power Core is open.
Rylos has stepped into the Titan Walker, chrome face bright in the volcano glare. He calls Gh0st a unit because calling him a person would admit the crime.

actions.name: commander rylos
actions.condition_unmet_message: Rylos waits on the Titan Walker, chrome face lit by the volcano.

actions.name: escape launch
actions.condition_unmet_message: The Astra can launch once the engine and arrays are aboard.

enemy_flavor.titan_walker_boss: Rylos brings the Titan Walker down like a judgment made of missiles and steel.

title: Escape Catwalk
description: A shaking catwalk runs from the Titan Dock toward the emergency gantry. Heat rolls up through the grate in hard orange sheets.

description_variants.description: The escape catwalk rattles under lockdown shutters. With the engine and arrays aboard, this is the last clean line back to the Astra before the Foundry seals itself.

actions.name: escape gantry
actions.condition_unmet_message: The escape gantry leads back to the Astra, but leaving empty would make all of this heat pointless.

title: Executive Dock
description: The Astra hangs beneath the Ring while Compliance fighters rake the hull. Beyond the airlock, a red carpet floats over bright-white flooring and the bodies of Thorne loyalists drift in dead gravity pockets.

description_variants.description: The Astra is locked hard to the Executive Dock, docking collar bent around stolen Foundry hardware. The fighter screen is gone, but the sealed airlock still treats the crew like cargo to be rejected.
The Executive Dock is pressurized and ugly beneath the polish. The airlock console shows three sealed breaches, and the red carpet keeps drifting where gravity pockets fail.

actions.name: docking controls
actions.condition_unmet_message: Compliance has the Astra in a tractor lock.

actions.name: sealed airlock
actions.condition_unmet_message: The station airlock refuses the crew until Gh0st breaks Thorne's old cipher.

actions.name: airlock console
actions.condition_unmet_message: Three hull breach warnings pulse across the pressure map.

enemy_flavor.orbital_fighter: Compliance interceptors pivot around the Ring with machine-perfect formation.

title: Airlock Gallery
description: A glass gallery curves above the docking collar. The planet turns below in perfect silence while the stolen Deep-Core Engine shakes heat through the Astra's spine.

description_variants.description: The Airlock Gallery is open now, and the Ring smells like disinfectant over panic. Vale's Compliance greeting loops from hidden speakers with no one left at reception to pretend it is normal.

actions.name: docking collar
actions.condition_unmet_message: The docking collar is close enough for the Astra to ram if the fighters stop shooting.

actions.name: compliance greeting
actions.condition_unmet_message: Vale's voice is warm, precise, and already edited to remove the possibility of refusal.

title: Grand Concourse
description: Golden Architect statues tower over an immaculate promenade. Every wall repeats Vale's compliance notices between advertisements for Harmony.

description_variants.description: The Grand Concourse keeps selling Harmony between lockdown warnings. Thorne's director logs are open now, and the gold statues look less like reverence than evidence.

actions.name: director logs
actions.condition_unmet_message: A private archive waits behind the Director's biometric lock.

title: Customs Lounge
description: A silent lounge waits behind velvet queue ropes and biometric gates. Luggage floats in gentle circles where gravity has failed, each case tagged PRIORITY HUMAN CAPITAL.

actions.name: biometric gates
actions.condition_unmet_message: The gates do not check identity so much as ownership, priority, and whether a body is approved to keep moving.

title: Solarium
description: Real soil, tropical trees, and a pale strip of sand sit beneath a fusion lamp. The fruit is rotting in a paradise built for executives.

description_variants.description: The Solarium mirror array burns clean again. The false sun is still false, but its light no longer feeds void-moss across the executive trees.
The fake beach has been crossed. Its sand keeps the shape of Nova's hand like paradise is trying to remember being real.

actions.name: fake beach
actions.condition_unmet_message: The artificial sun warms sand inside a station-sized cage.

actions.name: mirror array
actions.condition_unmet_message: Void-moss crawls over the Solarium mirrors, dimming the false sun.

title: Mirror Walk
description: Polished mirror panels line a humid maintenance walk behind the Solarium. Each panel reflects a different angle of the same fake sun.

description_variants.description: The Mirror Walk is painfully bright after realignment. Burnt void-moss flakes from the panel seams like ash from a polite disaster.

actions.name: mirror panels
actions.condition_unmet_message: The panels can burn away the void-moss if their angles are restored.

title: Security Hub
description: A fortified checkpoint seals the lift to the core. Compliance officers move without conversation while Null-G drones cling to the ceiling.

description_variants.description: The Security Hub patrol is down. Red lenses keep watching anyway, now more nervous than patient, while the service shaft lock blinks green.

title: Surveillance Pit
description: A sunken room of red lenses tracks every corridor on the executive deck. The screens flag posture, pulse, hesitation, and anything else a frightened system calls intent.

actions.name: red lenses
actions.condition_unmet_message: The lenses measure behavior, not guilt. Dominion has always preferred predictions to people.

title: Service Shaft
description: Gravity ends at the hatch. Cables descend through a vertical dark while Hunter-Killer droids scrape along distant walls, too armored to fight head-on.

description_variants.description: The service shaft route is marked by grip scratches, cable tags, and one clear timing pattern through the Hunter-Killer sweeps. The drop is still awful, but it is no longer unreadable.

actions.name: zero-g cables
actions.condition_unmet_message: The drop requires careful movement between patrol sweeps.

title: Zero-G Junction
description: Three maintenance tubes meet in a dead-gravity junction. Tools hover where workers dropped them, frozen into a quiet diagram of someone leaving in a hurry.

actions.name: patrol timing
actions.condition_unmet_message: The Hunter-Killer sweeps leave exactly enough dead space for a careful crew.

title: Server Farm
description: Server columns vanish into cold mist. Architect notation bleeds through the Dominion interface, and someone is breathing inside the cooling vents.

description_variants.description: The Server Farm no longer pretends to be endless. Zeke's coolant-pulse map marks the mainframe nave, three firewall nodes, a purged backup rack, and the route to Elara.
The Server Farm is wounded open. Firewall nodes alpha, beta, and gamma are dark, and the Anchor Chamber door answers Gh0st's voice from the far end of the cold.

actions.name: mainframe terminal
actions.condition_unmet_message: The terminal carries both Harmony and Architect root directories.

actions.name: server maze
actions.condition_unmet_message: Cold aisles repeat around the same impossible rack numbers.

actions.name: firewall node alpha
actions.condition_unmet_message: The first firewall node shifts its cipher every few seconds.

actions.name: firewall node beta
actions.condition_unmet_message: The second node is protected by a recursive Dominion lock.

actions.name: firewall node gamma
actions.condition_unmet_message: The final node projects a hard-light guardian into the aisle.

actions.name: purged backup rack
actions.condition_unmet_message: A server marked PURGED still carries a faint diagnostic pulse.

actions.name: dead sysadmin
actions.condition_unmet_message: A station administrator floats behind a coolant pipe, keycard still clipped to the uniform.

title: Mainframe Nave
description: Server columns form a cold cathedral around the mainframe terminal. Harmony's directory tree overlays older Architect notation like a luxury label pasted on a weapon.

description_variants.description: The Great Silence log is open on the mainframe terminal. Thorne's containment trace pulses beside it, proof that the person who built the cage finally got locked in it.

actions.name: mainframe terminal
actions.condition_unmet_message: The terminal carries both Harmony and Architect root directories.

actions.name: thorne trace
actions.condition_unmet_message: Thorne's emergency trace is buried behind the Great Silence log.

title: Firewall Alpha
description: The first firewall node hangs in a cage of blue hard-light. Its cipher keeps rewriting itself in Thorne's old notation with Vale's edits layered over the top.

description_variants.description: Firewall Alpha is dark. Its hard-light cage has collapsed into harmless blue dust across the server aisle.

actions.name: firewall node alpha
actions.condition_unmet_message: The first firewall node shifts its cipher every few seconds.

title: Firewall Beta
description: The second firewall node loops through recursion windows. Each window shows a slightly different version of the same locked door.

description_variants.description: Firewall Beta has folded into itself and gone still. The recursion windows show only the cold aisle ahead.

actions.name: firewall node beta
actions.condition_unmet_message: The second node is protected by a recursive Dominion lock.

title: Firewall Gamma
description: The final firewall node projects a half-built hard-light body into the aisle. Its face is blank because the system has not decided who it wants to execute yet.

description_variants.description: Firewall Gamma is gone. The hard-light body has shattered into dead glyphs, and the Anchor Chamber answers from beyond the final aisle.
Firewall Gamma has failed into violence. The hard-light body is complete now, blocking the Anchor Chamber with a blank execution face.

actions.name: firewall node gamma
actions.condition_unmet_message: The final node projects a hard-light guardian into the aisle.

enemy_flavor.firewall_construct: A hard-light construct assembles from defensive code, all angles and corporate certainty.

title: Purged Backup Rack
description: A low server rack marked PURGED still blinks through a layer of frost. Vale's deletion order missed one defensive routine hiding under old checksum names.

description_variants.description: The Purged Backup Rack is dark. Zeke has the defensive routine now, and Vale's deletion order has one clean failure in it.

actions.name: purged backup rack
actions.condition_unmet_message: A server marked PURGED still carries a faint diagnostic pulse.

title: SysAdmin Nest
description: A cramped admin station floats behind coolant pipes, abandoned halfway through an evacuation. A dead sysadmin still clutches a warning printout nobody above listened to.

description_variants.description: The SysAdmin Nest is empty of anything useful now. The keycard is in Nova's kit, still warm from a system that thinks privilege survives the person carrying it.

actions.name: dead sysadmin
actions.condition_unmet_message: A station administrator floats behind a coolant pipe, keycard still clipped to the uniform.

title: Anchor Chamber
description: A tank of conductive fluid hangs inside a cathedral of cables. Elara floats at its center, wired into the Ring as a living processor while the Anchor relic turns beside her.

description_variants.description: The conductive tank is emptying around Elara's cables. The Anchor relic is gone, and the Hunter-Killer's charge is frozen in a perfect Stasis moment.
Elara's firewall is open from the inside. She is present, fighting, and running out of time while the Anchor relic turns beside her like a lock waiting to be stolen.

actions.name: elara
actions.condition_unmet_message: Elara is inside the system, fighting through command layers to open the chamber from within.

actions.name: anchor relic
actions.condition_unmet_message: The Anchor remains locked to Elara's failing firewall.

enemy_flavor.hk_droid: The Hunter-Killer repairs every wound before it finishes opening. Only Stasis can stop its pursuit.

title: Throne Room
description: A glass observation deck looks down on the planet and its failing Shield. Thorne's containment field faces a command dais where Vale waits without blinking.

description_variants.description: The executive armory is open, its rack stripped of the Void Clip. Privilege survived its owner just long enough to be useful against Vale.
Thorne is dead. Vale is gone through the breach. The Throne Room is no longer a command center; it is wreckage arranged around a missing voice.
Vale's command dais is split by stolen light from the Anchor. Thorne's containment field flickers, and the executive armory still waits behind dead privilege.

actions.name: containment field
actions.condition_unmet_message: Thorne is trapped behind the field while Vale watches the Anchor.

actions.name: executive armory
actions.condition_unmet_message: The executive armory requires a station administrator's keycard.

title: The Tear
description: The Ring breaks into slow impossible angles around a wound in reality. Music exists here without air, speakers, or permission.

description_variants.description: The Compliance Avatar has lost cohesion. The Tear pulls at every loose fragment of the Ring, and music exists here without air, speakers, or permission.

actions.name: reality breach
actions.condition_unmet_message: The Compliance Avatar still anchors Vale's control of the breach.

enemy_flavor.compliance_avatar: Vale's security intelligence condenses into a towering hard-light execution protocol.

title: The Campfire
description: The Crash Site fire burns again, rebuilt from blue waveforms on an island of memory. Three unstable paths pull away from the flame, each tuned to a missing crew member.

actions.name: song-fire
actions.condition_unmet_message: The blue fire waits for every missing voice to return.

description_variants.description: The song-fire burns steady now. Zeke, Gh0st, and Orion are back in the circuit, and the Key waits in Nova's hand like a warm star with sharp edges.

title: Infinite Cubicle
description: Identical desks stretch beyond sight beneath fluorescent panels. Every cubicle contains a version of Zeke smiling through another impossible evaluation.

description_variants.description: The cubicles are still here, but the fluorescents have gone soft. Zeke's nameplate lies face-down on a desk he no longer needs to sit behind.

title: Performance Review Loop
description: A conference table repeats into itself. The Manager projection grades Zeke against criteria that rewrite every time he meets them.

actions.name: employee file
actions.condition_unmet_message: Zeke's employee record refreshes every time someone tries to close it.

enemy_flavor.manager_projection: The Manager weaponizes every fear that usefulness is the price of belonging.

title: Break Room Exit
description: A vending machine dispenses resignation letters instead of snacks. Beyond the cracked glass, the Campfire reflects in coffee gone cold.

title: Endless War
description: A corridor repeats under muzzle flashes without guns. Every target wears a Spectral ID, but the orders arrive before the faces resolve.

description_variants.description: The corridor is quiet now. Burned command prompts drift like ash, and Gh0st walks through them without waiting for permission.

title: Kill-Suite Loop
description: Red targeting brackets crawl over every wall. The loop keeps asking Gh0st to prove loyalty by surviving another order.

enemy_flavor.endless_war_echo: The loop gives every memory a weapon and every weapon Gh0st's hands.

title: Clean Signal Alcove
description: One blue waveform survives beneath the kill-suite noise. It is small, human, and stubborn enough to make the whole war hesitate.

actions.name: pure audio log
actions.condition_unmet_message: One clean recording of Elara survives beneath the kill-suite noise.

title: Silent Shore
description: A black ocean lies perfectly still beneath an empty sky. Every Aethel note dies at the waterline before Orion can hear an answer.

description_variants.description: The black ocean answers in low harmonics now. Orion stands at the shore as a survivor, not a monument.

title: Tide-Well
description: The shore drops into a circular well of black water. Every ripple carries an Aethel voice that vanished before Orion could answer.

enemy_flavor.silent_shore_wraith: Silence wears the outline of the last survivor and insists there is nobody left to answer.

title: Answering Chorus
description: Lights under the water answer one by one. They do not erase the dead; they prove the dead were never just absence.

title: Echo of the Mines
description: Jed's workshop, the mine checkpoint, and the first shelter occupy the same impossible room. Nova can see the place where fear started, but not the path out yet.

title: Jed's Echo Bench
description: Jed's old workbench sits under shelter plastic and mine dust. The tools are wrong for this place, but the care in their arrangement is exact.

actions.name: jed echo
actions.condition_unmet_message: Jed's workbench remains exactly where memory left it.

title: Manager Patrol Route
description: Manager projections march through overlapping shifts, checking Nova against every rule that ever tried to make her small.

actions.name: manager patrol
actions.condition_unmet_message: The projections reset the memory whenever they see Nova.

title: The Elevator
description: The mine elevator doors open onto white noise instead of a shaft. Its floor remembers every departure Nova could not stop.

title: Memory Bridge
description: A platform of static extends over the raw Source. Each honest memory spoken aloud becomes another section of bridge.

actions.name: unfinished bridge
actions.condition_unmet_message: The static needs memories the Source cannot counterfeit.

title: Shared Memory Span
description: The bridge forms from Tideglass sand, Foundry heat, Spire rain, and the Astra's engine note. Each step belongs to more than one survivor.

actions.name: campfire promise
actions.condition_unmet_message: The crew has one quiet moment before the final ascent.

title: Singularity Threshold
description: The bridge narrows into a bright wound in the sky. Vale's perfect world waits beyond it, polished clean of grief and therefore empty.

actions.name: singularity threshold
actions.condition_unmet_message: The path forward exists only when the whole circuit is ready.

title: Memory Stair
description: Jed's workshop door opens into jungle canopy, Spire glass, Foundry catwalk, and Ring metal arranged as an ascending spiral.

actions.name: aethel grave
actions.condition_unmet_message: Names written in resonance drift beneath the stair.

title: World-Fracture Landing
description: Chunks of every world rotate around the stair: mine dust, swamp moss, Spire rain, Foundry slag, and Ring ice all trying to become the only truth.

title: Spire of Thought
description: A spiral arena assembles itself from the Warden's checkpoint, jungle ruins, Spire glass, Foundry steel, and Ring servers. Every discarded memory is waiting higher up.

title: Impossible Archive
description: Shelves of futures turn their pages without wind. One scorched piece of the Astra juts from a timeline the crew is still trying to avoid.

actions.name: future astra hull
actions.condition_unmet_message: A scorched section of the Astra protrudes from a future that has not happened.

title: Memory Defense Arena
description: The archive folds into a hard circular arena. The Source stops tempting Nova with revision and starts defending the lie by force.

enemy_flavor.memory_leak: The leak pulses with Jed, Thorne, and Elara in the same unfinished frame.
enemy_flavor.nightmare_guard: The guard changes faces every time Nova recognizes someone she could not save.

title: The Center
description: A single platform rests on an infinite white ocean. Vale waits where every voice in the Source can hear him choose silence for them.

actions.name: tuning focus
actions.condition_unmet_message: Vale's code still blocks the Source. The Key cannot tune the world until both forms fall.

enemy_flavor.ascended_vale: Vale stands peacefully at the center of the universe, offering extinction as relief.
enemy_flavor.ascended_god: The human outline breaks. A blinding geometry rises from the white ocean and calls itself silence.

description_variants.description: The white ocean is no longer silent. Countless voices move through it like tidewater, separate and connected by choice.

title: New World
description: Morning reaches the Colony without a Shield overhead. At Zeke's diner, a community board holds a beach photograph and the memories Nova can no longer access alone.

actions.name: beach photograph
actions.condition_unmet_message: The photograph remembers Tideglass Beach for everyone in it.

description_variants.description: Morning reaches the Colony without a Shield overhead. At Zeke's diner, a community board holds a beach photograph and the memories Nova can no longer access alone.

title: Crash Site
description: The escape pod wreckage is half-submerged in warm glow-water. The cracked pod core ticks under a scorched access panel while thick vines hang from concrete struts. Zeke sits coughing on the hull, and a patch of scan moss pulses along the seams.

actions.name: wreckage
actions.condition_unmet_message: The pod's thrusters are completely fused. It won't fly again.

actions.name: pod core
actions.condition_unmet_message: Examining the pod's sub-critical core...

actions.name: glow-water
actions.condition_unmet_message: The water is warm and vibrates with a gentle frequency. It feels soothing to touch.

actions.name: scan moss
actions.condition_unmet_message: The moss on the hull vibrates under your scanner.

description_variants.description: The escape pod wreckage has cooled in the glow-water. Zeke is stable now, the pod core is dead weight, and the scan moss points inland toward the first clean signal.

title: Escape Pod Interior
description: The cramped interior of the escape pod is scorched and smells of melted plastic. Sparks shower from the console frame, and a dented emergency storage locker hangs open beside an emergency medkit.

actions.name: locker
actions.condition_unmet_message: A basic emergency kit contains field dressings and mineral water.

actions.name: emergency medkit
actions.condition_unmet_message: You carry the emergency medkit back to Zeke and work until his breathing steadies.

title: Scorched Brush
description: Shattered vines and charred branches litter the muddy clearing where the pod plowed through. A patch of charred starleaf is still warm to the touch, venting thin plumes of gray steam.

actions.name: charred starleaf
actions.condition_unmet_message: Beneath the scorched canopy, starleaf shoots glow blue where Source-rich water reaches them.

title: Overgrown Glade
description: A dense grove of giant broadleaf ferns arches overhead, filtering the dim sky into a green haze. Luminous mushrooms grow in thick clumps along a decaying log.

actions.name: luminous mushrooms
actions.condition_unmet_message: The mushrooms pulse in a slow rhythm. Their caps are edible once the toxic silver gills are removed.

title: Stream Bank
description: A narrow bank where the swamp mud gives way to smooth pebbles. A glow-water current runs eastward, gurgling softly as it cuts through the roots.

actions.name: glow-water current
actions.condition_unmet_message: The current carries warm notes through the roots, like the Ocean breathing under the swamp.

title: Security Perimeter
description: A smashed Dominion surveillance drone lies wedged between two stone blocks. Its primary scanner lens is shattered, but a small backup light still flashes a slow warning code.

actions.name: drone
actions.condition_unmet_message: The chassis is crushed, but its recording cells hum faintly.

title: Pod Fragment
description: A metal cargo panel from the escape pod has sheared off and sits wedged in the mud. Underneath it, salvage conduits, empty battery cells, and diagnostic wires lie scattered.

actions.name: salvage conduits
actions.condition_unmet_message: Salvaging power conduits from the pod wreckage...

title: Mist Pools
description: Deep wetlands where the glowing water pools into wide, still basins. Reed bulbs push through the mineral fog, making the patrolling Echo-Borer look like a floating shadow.

actions.name: reed bulbs
actions.condition_unmet_message: You cut away two resonant reed bulbs before their defensive spores can open.

title: Resonant Sedge
description: Thick marshes filled with glowing reeds. The wind passing through the reeds creates a low, musical whisper that seems to rise directly from the damp soil.

actions.name: spore warning
actions.condition_unmet_message: Amber sacs inflate along the path. Aethel markers identify the cloud as neurotoxic and harmful to Erosion control.

title: Crystalline Flats
description: A wide, sandy delta where the stream spreads thin. The crystalline sand catch the blue light of the water, shimmering and vibrating with a faint hum when stepped on.

actions.name: half-sunken causeway
actions.condition_unmet_message: Carved stones under the mud form an Aethel causeway aimed toward the Sanctuary Facility.

title: Resonant Falls
description: The stream cascades over three massive Architect stone pillars. Behind the falling water, a sheltered cookfire recess stays dry while the stone rings out a quiet, rhythmic chord.

actions.name: sheltered cookfire
actions.condition_unmet_message: A dry recess behind the falls makes a defensible campsite. The steady water-chord quiets the mental strain.

title: Beach Transition
description: The stream widens into brackish coastal pools. A tidepool crawler is trapped near the shallow margins where star-shaped crystals settle.

actions.name: tidepool crawler
actions.condition_unmet_message: A plated crawler is trapped between mineral spines; its clean flank can be dressed for the fire.

title: Cavern Entrance
description: A dark cavern opening behind the main waterfall shelf. Wet mist fills the air, and the stone walls are smooth, almost completely covered in dripping moss.

actions.name: cave glyphs
actions.condition_unmet_message: A light-mural maps surface water into the facility cooling system, joining swamp and Sanctuary as one machine.

title: Glow-Moss Cavern
description: A quiet cavern chamber lit entirely by thick sheets of glowing blue moss. An echo nest rings the far wall, and the damp stone carries the waterfall in a hollow rhythm.

actions.name: echo nest
actions.condition_unmet_message: Fresh claw marks ring a nest lined with bioluminescent moss.

title: Waterlogged Tunnel
description: A narrow tunnel where the cavern roof dips close to the glowing water. A current of warm water runs through it, gurgling as it flows toward the beach grotto.

actions.name: drowned console
actions.condition_unmet_message: The Aethel console still projects one phrase: THE OCEAN ENTERS THROUGH EVERY CRACK.

title: Beach Cliffs
description: High overlooking cliffs of black basalt. Below, a signal reflection stutters across the glowing shoreline of Tideglass Beach, its warm sands shimmering in the dark.

actions.name: signal reflection
actions.condition_unmet_message: Three distant beacon reflections stutter across the tideglass. One carries a Dominion patrol code.

title: Sandy Cove
description: A sheltered, sandy beach protected by tall stone walls. The sand is warm and dry, making it a safe place to set up a campfire and rest.

actions.name: campfire
actions.condition_unmet_message: The fire burns with a warm, steady glow, throwing long shadows on the stone walls.

title: Tide Pools
description: Glowing tide pools collect in the sand, calm enough to reflect the fog in pale blue sheets. Tide fishing is possible here, scan weeds pulse near the shore, and gather tideglass marks the useful herbs and clean meat Orion wanted.

actions.name: pools
actions.condition_unmet_message: The water hums with a deep subsonic tone, washing away local static.

actions.name: tide fishing
actions.condition_unmet_message: The tide pools are calm enough for fishing.

actions.name: scan weeds
actions.condition_unmet_message: The bioluminescent weeds glow when scanned.

actions.name: gather tideglass
actions.condition_unmet_message: Glowing tideglass skewers are harvested from the shore.

title: Beached Cargo Wreck
description: A rusted Dominion cargo container lies split open on the sand, its doors torn off. Sea-grass has claimed the interior, but crates of scrap metal are still visible.

actions.name: crates
actions.condition_unmet_message: The crates contain heavy scrap metal and industrial spare parts.

title: Sea Cavern
description: A high-ceilinged cavern carved by the waves. Water drains through fissures in the stone, creating hissing blowholes that spray fine mist into the dark.

actions.name: mineral shelter
actions.condition_unmet_message: Old bedroll hooks and a soot-blackened ceiling mark a patrol shelter abandoned in a hurry.

title: Sunken Obelisk
description: A colossal stone obelisk sits half-submerged in the surf. Ancient cymatic engravings cover the obelisk, glowing faintly as the tide rolls over them.

actions.name: resonant pillar
actions.condition_unmet_message: Touching the pillar sends a clean note through the beach and answers a deeper tone beneath the facility.

title: Hidden Grotto
description: A small, dry alcove hidden behind a basalt pillar. The cave walls are lined with smooth crystal clusters that glow with a cool, steady blue light.

actions.name: cache
actions.condition_unmet_message: A weathered stone pedestal holds the Source Resin weapon mod.

title: Star-Sand Dunes
description: Rolling dunes of fine crystalline sand sparkle in the dim light. A burrowing grazer ripples under the warm sand, and each step rings softly.

actions.name: burrowing grazer
actions.condition_unmet_message: You flush a small grazer from the warm sand and preserve enough meat for a trail meal.

title: Resonant Canopy
description: The canopy of the ruins is covered in giant, crystalline ferns that catch the dim light and buzz with low-frequency standing waves. Scan ferns and scan spores mark two different readings, while scavenge remains points to a fallen scout tangled nearby.

actions.name: ferns
actions.condition_unmet_message: Their leaves vibrate like harp strings when touched, ringing out a quiet chord.

actions.name: Scan ferns
actions.condition_unmet_message: The giant crystalline ferns echo in harmony.

actions.name: Scan spores
actions.condition_unmet_message: The razor-vine spores vibrate with high energy.

actions.name: Scavenge remains
actions.condition_unmet_message: A fallen Dominion scout lies tangled in the vines.

title: Spore Thickets
description: A dense tangle of glowing vines and thorned thickets. The air is thick with purple spores, and distress signature alpha repeats under the static hiss.

actions.name: distress signature alpha
actions.condition_unmet_message: The first beacon signature repeats beneath the spore hiss. Its vector points toward the patrol hollow.

title: Hound Nest
description: A clearing surrounded by jagged stone slabs. Shard-hound remains lie beside scavenged bones, and growls echo from the surrounding shadows.

actions.name: shard-hound remains
actions.condition_unmet_message: The nest contains a recent kill untouched by the spores. You salvage a clean cut.

title: Poison Hollow
description: A low-lying hollow filled with a thick, stagnant layer of toxic purple spores. Distress signature beta blinks inside a root cage, and every breath drains guard rapidly.

actions.name: distress signature beta
actions.condition_unmet_message: A second beacon is wedged inside a root. Its final packet names a cutter team near the ridge.

title: Patrol Graveyard
description: The rusted remains of a Dominion scouting squad lie scattered among the vines. Their suits are cracked, and one body holds a transceiver beside a damaged Thermal Cutter.

actions.name: transceiver
actions.condition_unmet_message: A fallen soldier holds an encrypted datapad, repair notes, and a damaged Thermal Cutter.

title: Canopy Edge
description: A sheer ledge looking out over the endless green canopy of Sector 9. The Planetary Shield grid waves are visible, curving across the sky.

actions.name: canopy route
actions.condition_unmet_message: From here the luminous waterways reveal a continuous route from crash site to temple ruins.

title: Hanging Root Bridge
description: A natural bridge formed by giant woven tree roots hanging over the gorge. The bridge sways in the wind, creaking like a ship's timber.

actions.name: razor-vine shortcut
actions.condition_unmet_message: The Thermal Cutter burns a clean path through the razor-vines, reopening the old canopy loop.

east.message_locked: Razor-vines choke the passage. The barbed stems will burst into toxic spores if cut cold.
east.message_unlock: The Thermal Cutter cauterizes the razor-vines. The old shortcut is open.

title: Architect Gateway
description: A massive, partially collapsed archway of smooth Architect stone. Faint cymatic glyphs flicker along the edges, pulsing in slow cycles.

actions.name: Aethel boundary stones
actions.condition_unmet_message: The archway translates swamp resonance into geometric light, the first threshold of the Sanctuary.

title: Beast Run
description: A wide trail of trampled vines and broken tree trunks. Giant claw marks are scarred into the bark of the crystalline ferns.

actions.name: toxic bloom
actions.condition_unmet_message: A violet bloom exhales corrosive spores. Holding your breath, you mark a safer return path.

title: Burned Glade
description: An open clearing burned clean by old energy discharges. The ground is glazed like black glass, and the patrol transceiver pings beneath a collapsed slab.

actions.name: patrol transceiver
actions.condition_unmet_message: The last distress signal resolves under a collapsed slab. Beside it lies the patrol Thermal Cutter.

title: Hunter's Blind
description: A high, ruined lookout platform constructed from ancient blocks. Spent sniper casings litter the stone, still warm.

actions.name: ridge campsite
actions.condition_unmet_message: A Dominion heat ring still works. Resting beside it lets a Neural Stabilizer settle the worst Erosion tremors.

west.message_locked: Razor-vines choke the passage. The barbed stems will burst into toxic spores if cut cold.
west.message_unlock: The Thermal Cutter cauterizes the razor-vines. The old shortcut is open.

title: Vine Climb
description: A sheer cliff wall covered in thick, climbable root-vines. The climb is steep, but the roots are strong and offer stable handholds.

actions.name: medic satchel
actions.condition_unmet_message: The satchel is empty except for notes describing Neural Stabilizers as temporary anchors against Erosion.

title: Windy Ledges
description: High stone shelves swept by cold upper-atmosphere wind. The ambient sound of the winds whistling through the gaps forms a low chord.

actions.name: blue-frond cluster
actions.condition_unmet_message: Hardy blue fronds grow beyond the spore line and make a bitter but safe cooking herb.

title: Beast Lair Approach
description: The approach to a massive dark overhang in the cliff face. A heavy, musky scent hangs in the cold air, and deep growls echo.

actions.name: weathered mural
actions.condition_unmet_message: Rain exposes a mural: human figures rendered as ice, listening to the vast Ocean beneath them.

title: Canopy Ridge
description: A wind-carved stone shelf high above the jungle. Look at Shield catches the Planetary Shield lattice pulsing overhead, while Confront stalker marks the huge shadow shifting in the brush.

actions.name: Look at Shield
actions.condition_unmet_message: The Planetary Shield curves across the sky, pulsing in a timed pattern.

actions.name: Confront stalker
actions.condition_unmet_message: Confront the hunter waiting in the shadows.

title: Shield Viewpoint
description: An open observation platform on the edge of the ridge. The Planetary Shield grid is directly visible, pulsing in timed waves.

actions.name: facility sightline
actions.condition_unmet_message: Sterile white towers emerge from living green. Root and conduit follow the same branching pattern.

title: Sniper Lookout
description: A narrow shelf near the summit offering a perfect view of the Canopy Ridge. Distress signature gamma flashes across abandoned spotting gear and ammo cases.

actions.name: distress signature gamma
actions.condition_unmet_message: A directional scope confirms the patrol signal terminates in the clearance below.

title: High Pass
description: A narrow crevice split into the mountain stone. The walls are so close they block out the wind, creating an eerie, absolute silence.

actions.name: razor-vine cache
actions.condition_unmet_message: The Thermal Cutter parts the thorn mat without bursting its toxic seed pods, exposing an old supply niche.

title: Sanctuary Outlook
description: A high stone plateau directly facing the Temple facades. The stone steps leading to the gateway are worn but stable.

actions.name: plateau camp
actions.condition_unmet_message: The stone remains warm after sunset. A small cookfire and shared food restore focus before the temple.

title: Stone Courtyard
description: A symmetric stone plaza in front of the gate. Geometric lines are carved into the ground, pulsing with a faint blue light.

actions.name: processional mural
actions.condition_unmet_message: Light figures carry bowls of Ocean-water inward while crystalline human shapes carry memory outward.

title: Outer Guard Post
description: A ruined outpost containing deactivated Dominion defense turrets. Rust and moss have fused the gears together.

actions.name: sanitation console
actions.condition_unmet_message: The console once stripped toxic spores from pilgrims before admitting them to the Sanctuary.

title: Resonator Chamber
description: The resonator console chamber in front of the gate. Two tuning wings flank a central slot designed to hold the Chime.

title: Left Tuner Column
description: The left resonator battery column holds the western resonance crystal in a copper-wired pillar that vibrates in low harmony.

actions.name: western resonance crystal
actions.condition_unmet_message: A violet crystal stores the low harmony missing from the stasis mural.

title: Right Tuner Column
description: The right frequency dampener column holds the eastern resonance crystal, filtering local seismic noise into an answering harmonic.

actions.name: eastern resonance crystal
actions.condition_unmet_message: A cyan crystal holds the answering harmonic from the facility east wing.

title: Temple Gate
description: A massive stone door, perfectly smooth, stands embedded in the cliff. It is engraved with glowing cymatic patterns, and the stone lock has a slot shaped like the Chime in the center of a metal resonator.

actions.name: Stone Lock
actions.condition_unmet_message: The stone lock hums softly, waiting for its matching resonance.

description_variants.description: The Temple Gate stands open, its cymatic patterns still glowing around the Chime slot. The resonator hums with a frequency that feels less like machinery than memory.

title: Sanctuary Grand Hall
description: A colossal foyer of clean, ancient geometry. The air is cool and dry, and faint bands of light shimmer along the floor.

actions.name: welcome console
actions.condition_unmet_message: Aethel text calls this place a shore: a safe edge where minds of Ice could approach the Ocean.

title: Left Reliquary
description: A wide alcove showing cracked Architect resonance crystals displayed on stone pedestals. The crystals hum in discord.

actions.name: botanical research log
actions.condition_unmet_message: The log confirms the swamp was cultivated to filter Source resonance, not allowed to overtake the facility.

title: Right Archives
description: A gallery lined with stone data columns. The columns show old wave logs and frequency diagrams etched in light.

actions.name: light-mural procession
actions.condition_unmet_message: Sterile panels bloom into wetland colors as you pass, erasing the boundary between vault and jungle.

title: Dominion Outpost
description: An abandoned security outpost setup. A console screen glows orange, reporting a breach in the stasis grid.

actions.name: terminal
actions.condition_unmet_message: Hacking the security database reports status: LOCKDOWN.

title: Hangar Portal
description: A heavy blast door blocking access to the hangar bay. Security conduits run from the door frame into the vents.

actions.name: security palimpsest
actions.condition_unmet_message: Layered warnings describe resonance overload as Erosion and prescribe chemical neural stabilization.

title: Maintenance Conduit
description: A dark, cramped ventilation crawlspace filled with bundles of thick optical wires and cooling conduits.

actions.name: maintenance spores
actions.condition_unmet_message: Bioluminescent fungus feeds on warm conduit leakage. Its spores numb exposed skin.

title: T-Junction Wiring
description: A junction point inside the crawlspace. Wire channels split off to the stasis deck and generator breakers.

actions.name: service map
actions.condition_unmet_message: The map reveals a return duct linking the Hall of Echoes to the foyer security hub.

title: Breaker Deck
description: An auxiliary generator cabin. Offline breakers hum with static, ready to be flipped to align stasis diagnostics.

actions.name: breakers
actions.condition_unmet_message: Flipping the auxiliary breaker alignment...

title: Access Shaft
description: A vertical access shaft with a rusted ladder. Steam vents from pipes along the shaft walls, making the rungs slick.

actions.name: shaft shortcut
actions.condition_unmet_message: The Thermal Cutter clears roots fused around the access ladder, reopening the climb into the vents.

north.message_locked: Razor-vines choke the passage. The barbed stems will burst into toxic spores if cut cold.
north.message_unlock: The Thermal Cutter cauterizes the razor-vines. The old shortcut is open.

title: Hall of Echoes
description: A grand corridor of clean, ancient geometry. The air is cool and dry. Shifting light-murals depict the history of the Architects, and a tune murals console flickers beside the central relief.

actions.name: murals
actions.condition_unmet_message: Shifting murals made of light. They shimmer when you approach.

actions.name: tune murals
actions.condition_unmet_message: The ancient console flickers, its resonance matrix misaligned.

title: Echo Alcoves
description: Small side alcoves designed for private study. Shifting light waveforms details the connection of minds.

actions.name: choir alcove log
actions.condition_unmet_message: Each alcove preserved one voice so no single mind had to hold the Ocean alone.

title: Acoustics Lab
description: A laboratory bay containing Dominion logging sensors focused on cymatic pool fluctuations. The northern resonance crystal hums inside a sealed acoustic rack.

actions.name: northern resonance crystal
actions.condition_unmet_message: A gold crystal vibrates at the mural alignment frequency.

title: Cymatic Basin
description: A circular basin of heavy mineral water. The waves forming on the surface form standing geometric shapes.

actions.name: reflection pool
actions.condition_unmet_message: Your reflection fractures into ice-bright facets while the water beneath remains a single dark Ocean.

title: Archive Vault
description: A circular archive vault filled with hollow stone cylinders. The cylinders hum softly when touched.

actions.name: Aethel extinction log
actions.condition_unmet_message: The final entry rejects conquest: pain came from treating the Source as an object rather than an Ocean.

title: Interface Console
description: A console room with a glowing interface panel. Old Architect diagnostics flicker in slow wave loops.

actions.name: research terminal
actions.condition_unmet_message: A clinical note defines Erosion as cognitive shear caused by incompatible resonance memories.

title: Tuning Matrix
description: A tuning matrix room containing four sound resonator columns. They must be tuned to C#m7.

actions.name: resonator
actions.condition_unmet_message: Tuning the resonator columns...

title: Hidden Reliquary
description: A hidden reliquary vault. A glowing stone pedestal holds the **Link Relic** upgrade.

actions.name: pedestal
actions.condition_unmet_message: A pedestal holds the Link Relic upgrade.

title: Stasis Chamber
description: A circular room dominated by a single humming Stasis Pod. Scan roots pulse through cracks in the floor, and search vents marks a narrow shaft along the upper ceiling.

actions.name: Stasis Pod
actions.condition_unmet_message: A sealed pod containing a sleeping figure.

actions.name: scan roots
actions.condition_unmet_message: The ancient roots are pulsing in slow rhythm.

actions.name: search vents
actions.condition_unmet_message: A narrow ventilation shaft runs along the upper ceiling.

description_variants.description: Orion's Stasis Pod hangs open in the circular chamber. Scan roots pulse through the floor as if the ruins are waking up with him.

title: Ring Array
description: The console room controlling the three concentric stasis rings. The alignment indicators hum with discordant tones.

actions.name: console
actions.condition_unmet_message: Bypassing the stasis ring alignment security lock...

title: Coolant Lines
description: A maintenance bay filled with stasis coolant lines. Stabilizing fluids hum inside the thick pipes.

actions.name: coolant garden
actions.condition_unmet_message: Facility coolant nourishes the same luminous vines seen outside, proving both ecosystems share one circulation.

title: Observation Deck
description: A glass-shielded viewing balcony overlooking the stasis deck. The terminal displays vital signs.

actions.name: stasis mural overview
actions.condition_unmet_message: Three empty sockets surround the chamber mural, waiting for west, east, and north wing crystals.

title: High Gantry
description: Walkway gantries suspended high above the stasis pod. A security grid sweeps across the dusty metal beams in tight, predictable pulses.

actions.name: security grid
actions.condition_unmet_message: Guard sensors sweep the vent junction. Gh0st can ghost their timing while you breach the grid.

south.message_locked: Razor-vines choke the shaft. The barbed stems will burst into toxic spores if cut cold.
south.message_unlock: The Thermal Cutter cauterizes the razor-vines. The shaft route is open.

title: Infiltration Hatch
description: A ventilation access grate has been sliced open from the inside. Scrap metal shavings litter the guard-system bypass route.

actions.name: guard-system bypass
actions.condition_unmet_message: You crawl between scan pulses, using Gh0st's timing marks to pass the dormant sentries.

title: Transmitter Site
description: A narrow tech alcove behind the pipes. A locked case contains a stolen Dominion transceiver core.

actions.name: case
actions.condition_unmet_message: A cargo case contains the Dominion transmitter core.

title: Source Dynamo
description: A massive dynamo spinning in a cylinder of glowing blue fluid, generating intense resonance.

actions.name: turbine inscription
actions.condition_unmet_message: Power was tuned like music here; every machine was expected to harmonize with the living swamp.

title: Distribution Manifold
description: Heavy manifolds route fluid to the gate emitters. A facility camp station glows under the pipes, shaking in time with the barrier hum.

actions.name: facility camp station
actions.condition_unmet_message: A maintenance heat plate offers sterile shelter. Food and a Neural Stabilizer bring Erosion back under control.

title: Generator Controls
description: The control station containing generator breakers. Flipping these overrides will drop the gate barrier.

actions.name: breakers
actions.condition_unmet_message: Overloading the main generator breakers...

title: Purge Valve
description: An emergency valve used to purge overloaded static charges from the dynamo lines.

actions.name: root pressure gauge
actions.condition_unmet_message: Roots outside regulate pressure inside. Severing either system would kill both.

title: Source Gate
description: A giant barrier of humming energy blocks access to the hangar. The Acoustic Lock vibrates with three discordant, howling frequencies.

actions.name: Acoustic Lock
actions.condition_unmet_message: The acoustic lock hums with intense dissonance.

description_variants.description: The Source Gate barrier has collapsed into harmless blue mist. The Acoustic Lock is quiet, and the route to the hangar finally belongs to the crew.

title: Harmonic Horn
description: The left emitter tower focusing the lock frequency. The copper horn vibrates violently.

actions.name: emitter memory
actions.condition_unmet_message: The emitter remembers thousands of minds crossing toward the Ocean, each held distinct like ice in current.

title: Resonance Cup
description: The right receiver cup grounding the barrier. The stone container is glowing white-hot.

actions.name: emitter service log
actions.condition_unmet_message: Technicians used Neural Stabilizers only as anchors; lasting recovery required rest and trusted voices.

title: Hangar Bay
description: A vast underground cavern open to the sky. The Astra sits silent on the launch pad, her Astra Console dark. Reboot Bridge waits on the central dais, and Launch the Astra is impossible until power returns.

actions.name: Astra Console
actions.condition_unmet_message: The ship's main console. The primary power conduit is completely severed.

actions.name: Reboot Bridge
actions.condition_unmet_message: Connecting conduits and rebooting bridge systems...

actions.name: Launch the Astra
actions.condition_unmet_message: Powering up the primary thrusters...

description_variants.description: The Astra's launch cradle is empty. Scorched conduits, cracked scaffolding, and a cooling Reboot Bridge mark the place where the crew clawed a route back to the sky.

title: Maintenance Catwalks
description: catwalks suspended around the Astra's charred hull. Cables run from the scaffold into the ship.

actions.name: hangar overlook
actions.condition_unmet_message: Vines lace the roof while immaculate Aethel rails descend below, a final union of wild growth and design.

title: Freight Lift
description: A freight lift used to load fuel cells onto the launch pad. The control motor is offline.

title: Control Console
description: The launch computer towers. Conduits from the stasis core are routed here to boot systems.

title: Fuel Intake Lines
description: Fuel intake lines. Fused fuel manifolds require manual routing to deliver starter fluid.

title: Launch Blast Shield
description: The ceiling blast shields covering the hangar. Massive gear teeth lock the shields in place.

title: The Sky
description: Flying high above the cloud layer, approaching the violet glow of the Planetary Shield. Zeke grins, but the console starts to beep frantically.

title: Mesosphere Storm
description: Ascending through violent storm clouds. Static charges discharge across the cockpit glass.

title: Shield Threshold
description: Directly facing the violet Shield lattice. The cockpit vibrates, systems reporting terminal warnings.

title: Security Buoy
description: A security buoy logging flight data. Its status arrays glow violet in key with the Shield.

title: Barrier Controller
description: The shield control node. It hums with the master curfew frequency of Sector 9.

title: Pushback Node
description: The boundary altitude. Flight thrusters shut down automatically to prevent disintegration.

title: Astra Bridge
description: A cramped cockpit of amber CRTs, exposed wiring, and four mismatched flight seats. The nav console waits beneath a web of handwritten route notes while the Chime hums in its shielded cradle.

actions.name: nav console
actions.condition_unmet_message: The atmospheric route map is online. Inter-world travel will unlock as destinations and the Astra flight systems become available.

actions.name: Chime
actions.condition_unmet_message: The Chime steadies the ship around a low Ocean-note, keeping the crew distinct as Ice inside the current.

title: Astra Common Room
description: Coffee rings stain the central table. A patched kitchenette faces a couch bolted to the deck, and the shielded relic array occupies one warm corner. This is where the crew stops being a formation and becomes a family.

actions.name: relic array
actions.condition_unmet_message: The shielded array can eventually synchronize late-joining crew members with recovered relics.

actions.name: central table
actions.condition_unmet_message: Meals, arguments, route plans, and the quiet work of becoming a crew all collect here.

title: Astra Living Quarters
